items.name: Gridiron Guitar
items.description: A unique guitar that says "No!" to good taste.

items.name: Emerald Knights of the Seventh Sanctum Staff
items.description: Use the magical power of Emeralds to immobilize and shock your target!

items.name: Rockin' Pink Guitar
items.description: Rock on! Use the keys 'Z', 'X', 'C', 'V', 'B', 'N', 'M', to play different chords. You can play sharp version of the notes by holding shift. You can alter the pitch as well with the keys 'G', 'H', 'J', 'K', 'L'.

items.name: Magnificent Magenta Paintball Gun
items.description: Everyone's screen can always use a little more magenta.

items.name: Blow Dryer
items.description: Point and hold down the left mouse button to unleash a stream of hot air that will blow the competition away (quite literally).

items.name: Staff of Staff
items.description: This staff is ready to do maximum staff damage.  The Staff of Staff fires tiny damage-causing bloxikins at your foes to do 15 damage per hit.  Hit the 'Q' key to perform a special attack.

items.name: Anchor Cannon
items.description: Anchor your competitors in place.  They'll be unable to walk for 10 seconds.

items.name: Illuminating Spear of Revengeance
items.description: There are people who will tell you that revengeance is not a thing, but those are people have never felt the way you do.... or they own dictionaries. Revengeance is yours with this spear that both stabs and charges up for a super powerful attack.

items.name: Radiant Seahorse
items.description:
"I only travel by seahorse these days. All the best people are doing it!"

Use the arrow keys or 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' to steer your seahorse in whichever direction you'd like to go.

items.name: Gravitational Radiation Hammer v0.01
items.description: Utilizing the latest in subspace/molecular deformation technology for mining on the planet Ysteb, the Gravity Hammer will expel objects surrounding its user in an outward vector. Warning: currently the Gravity Hammer does not work on objects that contain anchoritium.

items.name: First Class Fencing Sword
items.description: Fence your way to a gold medal with this first class sword.

items.name: Discus 2012
items.description: Throw this discus far enough and you'll get an explosive reward.

items.name: Emergency Rations
items.description: Increases your max health by 100 points.

items.name: Squid Launcher
items.description: Launch everyone's favorite squid, Mr.Tentacles at your enemies to obscure their screens in ink while doing 15 damage per hit. The squid will wrap its tentacles around your enemies head and shoot ink in their face!

items.name: Midnight Motor Madness Scooter
items.description: It's a party on a bike...that delivers tacos! Ride around using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit 'X' to toggle the headlight and 'H' to honk. Click with your mouse to grab a taco from the crate on the back of the vehicle and eat it.

items.name: 8-Bit Crossbow
items.description: This 8-bit crossbow deals 20 damage upon impact on a player.

items.name: Spider Morning Star
items.description: Click and hold to spin the spider in a circular motion. Release the mouse button when you're ready to send the spider hurling towards your foes.

items.name: Staff of Double Disasters
items.description: Swing this mighty staff above your head to summon double disasters!  A tornado and tsunami will trouble your foes while you are safe.

items.name: Bad Seed
items.description: This snapdragon snaps back! Click to drop and your plant will take a bite out of anyone close enough to stop and smell the roses.

items.name: Chopper Broom
items.description: Hey bud, wanna race? Equip and click and drag to rev your engine and fly around in the direction of your cursor.
